text: ذُكِرَ عِنْدَهُ أَصْحَابُنَا وَ ذُكِرَ الْعَقْلُ قَالَ فَقَالَ ( عليه السلام ) لَا يُعْبَأُ بِأَهْلِ الدِّينِ مِمَّنْ لَا عَقْلَ لَهُ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ إِنَّ مِمَّنْ يَصِفُ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ قَوْماً لَا بَأْسَ بِهِمْ عِنْدَنَا وَ لَيْسَتْ لَهُمْ تِلْكَ الْعُقُولُ

فَقَالَ لَيْسَ هَؤُلَاءِ مِمَّنْ خَاطَبَ اللَّهُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ خَلَقَ الْعَقْلَ فَقَالَ لَهُ أَقْبِلْ فَأَقْبَلَ وَ قَالَ لَهُ أَدْبِرْ فَأَدْبَرَ فَقَالَ وَ عِزَّتِي وَ جَلَالِي مَا خَلَقْتُ شَيْئاً أَحْسَنَ مِنْكَ أَوْ أَحَبَّ إِلَيَّ مِنْكَ بِكَ آخُذُ وَ بِكَ أُعْطِي.

en.hubeali: Abu Abdullah Al Aasimy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Ali Bin Asbaat, from Al Hassan Bin Al Jahm,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘Our companions were mentioned in his<sup>asws</sup> presence, and the intellect was (also) mentioned. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not package (consider as the same) the people of the Religion from the one who has not intellect for him’. I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! From the ones who are described to be upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), there is a group for whom there a no problems with them in our presence, and there isn’t that (kind of) intellect for them’.

So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They are not from the ones whom Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Addressed. Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created the intellect, so He<sup>azwj</sup> Said to it: “Come!” So it came. And Said to it: “Turn back!” So it turned back. So He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: ‘By M<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and My<sup>azwj</sup> majesty! I<sup>azwj</sup> have not Created anything better than you, or more Beloved to Me<sup>azwj</sup> than you. Due to you, I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Seize, and due to you I<sup>azwj</sup> shall Give’.
